text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day in the middle of March, I stumble upon
Seiun Sky lost in thought. It's not a side of her I
see often.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hm... Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's nothing. Or at least, nothing big.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...But can I ask your opinion on something?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky opens up, revealing that the other day,
when she asked Nishino Flower to be her date to
the Ligne Droite...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Nishino Flower asked for time to consider it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Can you believe it? Gaaah...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, maybe it was a bad
move for me to fall asleep while she was talking
the other day.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And that time I jumped out of nowhere while she
was carrying flowers to scare her probably didn't
help either...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's chattering on like nothing big happened,
but I can kind of tell by her face that she's
bummed.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...I thought she could only say yes or no. Had no
idea there was a third option.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her worried look suggests that she's wondering
whether Nishino Flower hates her.
choice_data_list:
If she was going to turn you down, I think she
would've done it already.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Really?
choice_data_list:
There's got to be a reason why she asked for
time.

There's got to be a reason why she asked for
time.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So... it's not because she hates me?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Okay.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You're probably right. Thanks, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky, back to her usual self, mutters while
leaving my office, "In that case, I'll need more
information if I'm going to win this war."

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Dancing's so hard... I don't think I'll ever get the hang of it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Is that...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... So I hold the flower here, and bend the stem like
this? Is that right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Are you... making a flower crown?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey there, Flower. Hehe, I sure am. It's a present
for a flower fairy.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But it's harder than I thought it'd be. Turns out my
present's more suited for a trash can.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
No! It's the thought that counts. I'm sure the
person it's meant for will be over the moon, since
you worked so hard making it yourself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky's conflicted expression softens into a
satisfied smile.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But anyway, Flower, about your answer for the
Droite...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You're probably thinking no, right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
N-no, that's not it at all! I'm sure it'd be really fun
to go to the Droite with you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It's just... you're so good at dancing, I wanted to
try to get good before answering... I'm sorry I
made you wait so long.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey... Lemme tell you something I heard once.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
A prom isn't a dance competition. It's a place
where you make memories.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So, like...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to be good. I just want to make
some good memories together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky gently places her poorly made flower
crown on Nishino Flower's head.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: What do you say, flower fairy?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Uh... huh?! Fairy?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You said it yourself... It's the thought that counts.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh, I... That...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yeah... You're right... Hehehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I spot Nishino Flower smiling as
she heads to the Droite together with Seiun Sky.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Searching memory for "worries, Nishino Flower"...
One result found dated last night, 9:41 p.m.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Contents determined to be relevant. Initiating
playback.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Sky asked me to the Droite, but she's such a great
dancer...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I'm not very good, so I'm afraid I'll embarrass her.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm practicing so hard. I need to
improve before I can say yes. End of playback.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, now I get it.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Analyzing facial expression... You are feeling
slightly surprised.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... This is a little outside what I was
expecting.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
One foot here, and then the other like this... Ooh,
I'll never get the hang of this.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: At this rate, I should probably just say no. But...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Then she might end up going with someone else.

Ding-ding! It's trivia time! What is the most
important thing to have at dance practice?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh! It's you, Sky!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: The answer iiis... fun!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So dance with me, Flower, and you'll have
nothing but fun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky takes Nishino Flower's hand and leads
the two of them into the first movements of a
dance.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: One, two, turn... Now a big step. And turn...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa... Haha! I did it!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You picked that up pretty quick, but no surprise
there. Hmm, okay! Ready for the spin together?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wooo! ...Heehee! This is really fun.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, I spot Nishino Flower smiling as
she heads to the Droite together with Seiun Sky.
